title: Capture recorder wired to wrong device — MP4 records a different device's screen

recorded_device_actual.attribution: frame app-set matches installer/list inventory exactly (Tether, Tether2, masterhand x2, WebDriverAgentRunner, iDevice Test APP); on-screen clock matches device timezone
MP4 frames show Roku City screensaver, TV aspect; phone fingerprint is ~752x1664 portrait

expected: Capture MP4 shows the screen of the locked device named in device_address
actual: MP4 shows a different physical device's screen; session ends state=ended, error_code=null with no warning
impact: Recordings silently invalid on affected serials
Video-derived analyses (issue cards, video time series, MOS) computed against wrong screen
No platform-side detection; customer must frame-fingerprint every MP4
suggested_triage: Audit recorder-to-device rig assignments on dev-ca-tor-0 proxy-1 and proxy-2
Add capture-start sanity check comparing recorder frames to device display fingerprint
